2256460.name: Five Likes Please - Neon Pack
2256460.description:
A pack that includes new futuristic-themed weapons that operate on heat rather than reloading. This pack also includes more reticules, reticule colors, weapon camos, and the ability to change any base weapon's tracer/muzzle flash color. Below is a list of new features:

  • M9 Laser Gun
  • P90 Laser Gun
  • M14 Laser Gun
  • WA2000 Laser Gun
  • Pump Action Laser Gun
  • AA12 Laser Gun
  • Stoner Laser Gun
New reticules:
  • Bar
  • Cross
  • Spaced Cross
  • Long Cross
  • Launcher
  • Spaced Circle
New reticule colors:
  • Yellow
  • Teal
  • Purple
  • Black
New weapon camos:
  • Pure Black
  • Pure White
  • Concrete
  • Pink
  • Sea Foam
  • Copper
  • Silver
  • Chrome
  • Steel
  • Ruby
  • Deep Purple
  • Gold
  • Glass
  • Rainbow
